name: Rolled Molasses Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and return it to the sifter.
2. Add baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and ginger one at a time, mixing as each is added.
3. Cream the shortening and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the egg, then blend in the molasses.
5. Gradually mix in the dry ingredients into the wet mixture.
6. Roll out small amounts of dough to desired thickness and cut into shapes.
7. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on racks.
